---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an enhancement to supportctl or the support-domain charter
title: "[feat] <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
For large or architectural changes, please open an issue to discuss before
sending a pull request (see CONTRIBUTING.md).

This repo owns the support-domain charter, contracts, the supportctl operator
CLI, and runbooks. It intentionally does NOT own the live script-delivery
plane, reusable networking, or the security/approvals control plane — requests
that belong to those domains should be raised against the owning repo.
-->

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected (which human / role)?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Domain fit

- [ ] This belongs to the support domain (ticket workflow, consent/scope,
      diagnostics/remediation, evidence, offboarding, `supportctl`).
- [ ] This may cross into networking or security domains (explain below).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you discarded them.

## Additional context

Add any other context, contract impact, or examples here.
